summary: The diff implements the required fix for remote audio in video calls. The changes cover: useVideoCall.ts requesting audio:true in getUserMedia, creating a simulated remote stream from a cloned audio track, exposing remoteAudioRef, attaching srcObject and calling play() on the remote audio element, and clearing srcObject on endCall. VideoCallModal renders a dedicated audio element with autoPlay, not muted, and synced to remoteAudioRef. ChatView passes remoteAudioRef to VideoCallModal. All REQ-16 acceptance criteria appear to be addressed.
